query: The discount calculation logic is duplicated in the CartService, the InvoiceService, and the ReportService. Each has slightly different implementations.
expected_behavior: Names the business consequence: 'When the discount rules change (e.g. new promo type), 3 files must be updated and any divergence creates incorrect totals in at least one context'
Uses Truth Centralization as the job: extract into a single DiscountCalculator service
Checks whether the three implementations are actually identical or have intentional variations before extracting
Applies the Safe Sequence: Lock (write tests capturing current behavior of all 3) → Extract (build DiscountCalculator) → Replace (swap in the 3 call sites one at a time, verifying after each)
Does not refactor without green tests for all 3 current implementations first
